dialogos.texto_en: Wow, the sea is breathtaking, isn't it?\nIt makes me sleepy, though...
Ichika, weren't you just sleeping on the float earlier?
Yeah, I was. But the sound of the waves\nis making me feel drowsy. Are you not feeling sleepy,\nItsuki-chan?
Well, I get how you feel, but...
Sleeping too much isn't a good idea,\nespecially since we came all the way to Okinawa.\nHow about swimming for a while?
(Huh? Are Ichika and Itsuki talking over there?)
Oh, it's Futaro-kun. Hiya.
Hey Itsuki, are you feeling better now?
Yes, thanks to you. Sorry for causing some trouble earlier.
Trouble? What happened?
Well, Itsuki went swimming with Yotsuba, but\nforgot to pace herself and ended up exhausted.
Ah...\nI guess keeping up with Yotsuba's pace can be very exhausting.
I was fine until I got out of the water, though...
Yeah, I get it.\nWhen you're swimming you tend to overdo things, \nif you think you're doing fine.
Yes, exactly. I'll keep it in mind the next time.
By the way? Can I ask you something, Futaro-kun?
What?
Are you two taking a break here?
We were just enjoying the beauty of the ocean. Are you joining\nus, Uesugi-kun?
Yeah, sure.
By the way? Can I ask you something, Futaro-kun?
What?
I wanna hear about last night,\nwhen Nino disappeared from our room.
Huh?!
What exactly was that about?
Well, um...
Fill me in Ichika.\nWhat happened to Nino?
Last night, when I woke up in the middle of the night,\nNino was gone. I just wanted to ask Futaro-kun\nif he knew anything about it.
Uesugi-kun?!\nWhat exactly did you do...!
W-wait a second.\nCalm down.
What were you thinking?\nI never thought you were that kind of person!
Hmmmm?\nI only said that Nino was gone.
Huh?
Besides, I didn't say that Futaro-kun was involved\njust because I wanted to ask him.
Ah...
What did you imagine, Itsuki-chan?
Ooooh!\nTh-that's...
(I should keep quiet here...\n It's obvious that nothing good will happen if I'm \n getting involved.)
U-Uesugi-kun!
Huh?
You have betrayed our father's trust?!\nI'm so disappointed in you!
(Oh no, she's directing her anger towards me!)
That's not true!\nNothing your wild fantasy spit up happened last night!
Nino did come to my room last night,\nbut we just talked a bit!
...Is that true?
It's true. I swear on whatever you want.
Okay, I believe you.
It doesn't matter what you imagined.
Huh? What do you mean?
It doesn't matter if your fantasies are running wild, Itsuki,\nthey're off the mark.\nI have nothing to hide from you guys.
Oh, really?\nWell then, why don't you tell us what happened?
Nino did come to my room last night,\nbut we just talked a bit!
Is that true?
It's true. I swear on whatever you want.
Okay, I believe you.
Stop teasing Itsuki.\nShe's serious in her own way, you know?
Ahaha.\nI know, but Itsuki-chan's reactions are so cute,\nI can't help it.
Oh, come on, Ichika!
But really, Itsuki is Itsuki.\nShe jumps to conclusions without\nlistening to what people are saying.
Ooh...sorry...
Well, I know that's just how you are.
Nino did come to my room last night,\nbut we just talked a bit.
Is that true?
It's true. I swear on whatever you want.
Okay, I believe you.
...That was easy.
I highly value your honesty.\nBesides, Nino said the same thing.
If so... I'll believe you too, Uesugi-kun.
*sigh*\nI feel exhausted all of a sudden.
I'll go get something light to eat and drink.\nDo you two want anything?
I'm good, thanks.
I'm fine too.
Okay, I'll be back.
Hey, Ichika.\nYou sent a text last night, right?
How was the timing?\nWasn't it perfect?
Well, yeah, it helped a lot.\nBut couldn't you have stopped Nino before she left?
Hm? What do you mean?
You were awake when she left, right?
Wow, good catch, Futaro-kun.\nYou noticed that?
So, do you know why I didn't stop her?
...I have a guess.
Good, I'm glad you're not that clueless.
But like I said before,\nbe careful not to make Nino feel uneasy.
Yeah, I know.
